mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO orders(id, user_id, product_id, quantity, amount, status) VALUES(#{id}, #{userId}, #{productId}, #{quantity}, #{amount}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, product_id, quantity, amount, status, create_time, update_time FROM orders WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, user_id, product_id, quantity, amount, status, create_time, update_time FROM orders WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 100
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET status = #{toStatus} WHERE id = #{id} AND status = #{fromStatus}
